title: SQLite schema, migrations, and repository adapter
description: Add versioned SQL migrations and a SQLite-backed TodoRepository implementing the application port, with explicit database path resolution/factory (no mutable global connection), a migration runner that succeeds on empty DB and after bumps, and integration tests using a temporary file or equivalent isolated database.
acceptance: Migrations are versioned SQL files applied in order; fresh DB and schema bump scenarios are covered by tests or documented verification.
TodoRepository adapter maps domain types correctly for all CRUD operations required by use cases.
Database access uses explicit factory or per-request style wiring per singleton-policy in the brief (no mutable global SQLite pool).
Integration tests validate persistence round-trips against a temp file DB without touching developer production paths.
Migration or open failures are distinguishable for upper layers to map to user-safe messages (no stack traces required at this layer).
